<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep diffs small and focused.
Run `make ci` locally before opening the PR.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. If it fixes an issue, link it: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New eval case(s)
- [ ] New / improved grader
- [ ] Bug fix (grader false positive/negative)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (gate on good responses + tests)
- [ ] New eval cases include **both** a `good` and a `bad` example response
- [ ] `good` examples pass and `bad` examples fail (`make eval`)
- [ ] No real personal data in any example message
- [ ] New check types are registered in `GRADERS`, unit-tested, and documented in `CONTRIBUTING.md`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, known limitations, follow-ups. -->
